title: Stainless Steel Flat Zester Grater, 1 Pack, 23.5cm, Perfect for Grating, Garlic, Parmesan Cheese, Chocolate, Lemon and Limes, Durable and Rust Proof Zester, with Hanging Hole (1 Pack)
features: 🧀🍋🥕🥔 VERSATILE KITCHEN GRATER - These versatile kitchen graters can meet all your daily needs. It can quickly grind Parmesan cheese, lemon and citrus fruits, which is easier and faster than knives! Become a chief in the kitchen whilst you prepare your favourite meals

🧀🍋🥕🥔 SOLID DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - These graters adopt’s a durable food grade stainless steel design, designed for a long service life. The stainless steel material is easy to clean and can be washed in the dishwasher
🧀🍋🥕🥔 SHARP BLADES FOR EASY GRATING - The grater blade is sharp, easy to use, and has smooth edges that will not scratch your hands
🧀🍋🥕🥔 EASY TO CLEAN - Rinse with water after use, convenient and quick, no gaps and residues to breed bacteria. Dishwasher safe
🧀🍋🥕🥔 STORES EASILY A REAL KITCHEN MUST HAVE - The tail of this grater has a hook so that it can be hung in the kitchen for easy storage and quick drainage
description: Product Description Great Reasons to Grate with our Grater Great for Zesting Citrus Fruits Unleash your culinary creations effortlessly with our versatile kitchen grater, fab for zesting lemons and citrus fruits. It's sharp blades provide a quick and efficient way to infuse vibrant flavors and aromatic essences into your recipes, elevating your dishes with ease and precision. Fabulous for Adding Decorative Toppings. Indulge your sweet tooth by using our versatile kitchen grater to effortlessly grate chocolate, fabulous for adding a delectable touch to desserts as a decorative topping and infusing rich chocolate flavour into cocktails for a delightful twist. Handy Hanging Hoop. The handy hanging hoop on our kitchen grater adds a practical touch, allowing for easy storage in your kitchen. Simply hang it up, providing quick access while saving valuable counter top space, making it a convenient and efficient addition to your culinary toolkit.
